backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the service desk app, defining data types and CRUD endpoints for clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, user profiles, signatures, and Stripe/payment integration with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (business name on invoice, custom labor line items, configurable tax rate, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' and mounting the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with all application routes (dashboard, clients, jobs, invoice, calendar, inventory, settings, login, profile setup) and exports the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header showing the company logo and name, authentication/profile redirect logic, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: A React component that renders a canvas-based signature pad allowing users to draw, save, or skip their signature, using the useSignaturePad hook and a mutation to store the result.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for backend entities including clients, jobs, labor rates, parts, user profiles, and Stripe configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: A hook that attaches mouse and touch drawing event listeners to a canvas ref, tracking stroke state and exposing clear and PNG-export utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes including sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays jobs grouped by day in EST timezone, with drag-and-drop reordering, cost summaries (diagnostic fee, labor, tax), and status badges for each job.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client record, supporting save and delete operations with confirmation dialog, backed by actor queries and React Query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: List page showing all clients with search filtering, navigation to individual client detail pages, and a button to open the client's Google review URL.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page displaying metric cards (total jobs, open, in-progress, complete, clients) and a recent-jobs list, with owner-only visibility for certain metrics.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page for parts, supporting inline add/edit/delete with low-stock warnings, search filtering, and owner-restricted actions via CRUD mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a printable/downloadable invoice for a given job, including parts, labor line items, tax calculation, and a signature pad for capturing/storing the technician's signature.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Full job create/edit form page supporting client selection, status, notes, labor line items, parts, photos, and navigation to the invoice preview.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists all jobs grouped and filterable by status (Open, In Progress, Complete), displaying each as a card with client name, date, and status badge.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the home page on success and showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page where new users enter their name and optionally draw/save a signature before being routed to the main app.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing labor rates (create, edit, delete) and configuring Stripe payment integration, with owner-only access controls and logout functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, sidebar/chart color sets, custom shadows, and accordion/fade-in animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 23) describing the ICP/Motoko service-desk app architecture, role-based access design, known issues (owner principal mismatches, missing features), and a list of existing implemented features for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC.
